sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65731" key="mei=on1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεῖον</orth> (A), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, neut. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μείων</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
